meta.name: GF Fire Alarm Push Button
meta.description: Fire alarm push button with optional IP camera module
meta.heroTitle: Fire Alarm Push Button with Optional IP Camera
meta.heroDescription:
UL Listed fire alarm push button with optional integrated IP camera for visual verification upon activation. Operating modes: Push-to-Activate and Key-to-Reset.

Available with optional protective cover, with or without integral sounder, to reduce misuse and accidental activation.

Designed for integration into regulated fire alarm systems.
